Hey everybody, it's me, Donald Miller, and congratulations on buying the Storybrand Marketing Roadmap. This is going to be a marketing plan for you to execute this year, and it's going to get results. Listen, it's gonna take a little bit of work. We're gonna teach you to create six marketing pieces, or actually six tools that create great marketing pieces that are going to get results for your customers. Here's a few things to remember. I want you to use this like an education. I want you to use this like you went off to school and you've got some time here. It may take you three to six months to execute everything in this plan, but get it down, really focus, make a schedule and get things done, a task list to get these things done. The great news is you've got to work hard to get them done, but once they're done, they just live on the internet, and they create sales over and over. And also once you get the first campaign done, because really we're teaching you to create a campaign and you can create other campaigns, just duplicate the process. Once you get one campaign done, then you wanna go create another campaign, then you wanna come back and you wanna revise the first campaign and tweak it, sharpen the hooks, make it even stronger, and then just let it be automated and automate your sales. Then come back and tweak the next one, then create another one. So that's basically how you're gonna use this course. You'll use it to create a marketing roadmap in campaigns for each product that you wanna sell or for your overall company. Teaching the course is me and Ray Edwards. I'm a writer, I've written a bunch of books, and I grew my company from a quarter million to about 3.6, and we'll do about six million this year. And I did it just by using these pieces of marketing collateral that we're gonna teach you to create. I'm joined by my co-teacher, Ray Edwards. Ray is a dear friend, mainly because he's got this huge heart, he's just a wonderful human being. He wrote the book, Copy That Sells, and he writes sales letters for all sorts of major corporations, and for his own multi-million dollar business as well. Ray was once paid $180,000 to write a single sales letter. He knows what he's talking about. In fact, if you just, I don't wanna encourage you to skip ahead in the course, but he's got this thing called a pastor framework where he teaches you to write a sales letter using the P for problem, A for amplify, S for story, and he'll teach you to write a sales letter. If you just wanna skip ahead and write a sales letter real quick and go get the money back that you invested this course, you could probably get that done today. In fact, we had a little challenge when we were certifying some copywriters to see who could make their $10,000 investment back, and by the end of the training, using the pastor framework, two of our certified copywriters had already made more than $10,000 by the end of the week. That's just with one of the tools. So imagine that tool duplicated by six, having a great website that does that, email nurturing campaigns that do that, sales letters that do that, PDFs that do that. You'll wanna slowly learn these things. And now, I don't want you to get overwhelmed. There's a lot of material in this course, but at the same time, if you just learn a little bit of the material and you execute it, you're gonna see results. Then you learn a little more of the material and you execute it, you see more results. And pretty soon, over three to six months, you've got the whole thing figured out and you're running a great marketing campaign and you're seeing your company do what my company's doing, it's just hockey sticking straight up. We've seen companies double, triple, quadruple in revenue just by executing, creating the tools that we're about to help you create. So you've got a great workbook, the workbook is extremely valuable. The videos, of course, work with the workbook, but you can actually read through the workbook and learn a lot of these formulas. Just get these things into your brain so that you can execute them. I am very, very encouraged that you brought this course. The main reason I'm encouraged is because you're gonna stop wasting money on marketing. No more expensive Facebook ad campaigns that don't work, no more creating, giving a bunch of money to a web designer who's not familiar with Storybrand and can't, makes a pretty website but it doesn't make you any money. Those days are over. This is your new marketing plan and I think you can execute it this year and I think you can start seeing results. When you see results, when you go through this, will you do us a favor? Will you call us, will you email us? Will you share those results with us? Because it increases staff morale when we hear these incredible success stories about your success. That's what we're in it for. I wish you the best.
